title: Take a different route to wherever you're going today
flavour: new input. different streets. novel stimuli. your brain will notice.

title: Eat something you've never tried before
flavour: your palate is stuck in 2018. expand it. one new thing.

title: Change one thing about your morning routine
flavour: you've been doing it the same way for years. swap one element. see what shifts.

title: Listen to a genre of music you'd normally skip
flavour: algorithm: defeated. your taste: temporarily hijacked. it's fine.

title: Rearrange a piece of furniture
flavour: your environment shapes your thoughts. rearrange the thoughts by rearranging the room.

title: Wear something you own but never actually wear
flavour: the unworn item is a commitment you made and forgot. honor it.

title: Watch or read something outside your usual taste with full commitment
flavour: no ironic distance. no eye-rolling. full sincere engagement. feel it.

title: Sit at a different spot than usual — new café, different room, outside
flavour: same you, different coordinates. context shifts cognition. move.

title: Say yes to the next spontaneous invitation you get today
flavour: something will come up. say yes. log off from the plan.

title: Flip a coin to decide something you've been overthinking
flavour: the coin doesn't decide. your reaction to the coin result tells you what you wanted.
